name: Blackberry Cordial
recipeIngredient: 2 Cups Crushed Blackberries (About 2 Quarts Whole Berries)
recipeInstructions:
1. Put the freshly crushed berries, including the juice, into a jar with 2 cups of brandy.
2. Shake well and seal tightly.
3. Let steep for one week.
4. Pour the mixture through a wire strainer several times, pressing out all the liquid.
5. Strain well through cheesecloth.
6. Add the remaining cup of brandy and the sugar syrup.
Note: Common spice combinations to add to blackberry cordials include:
1) Cinnamon
2) Clove and cinnamon
3) Cinnamon and nutmeg
4) Cinnamon, clove, and mace
5) Cinnamon and coriander
